wrong_cases.question: How many days ago did I launch my website when I signed a contract with my first client?
wrong_cases.hypothesis: You launched your website 43 days ago, on 2023-02-10. I don’t have the contract-signing date in my notes, so this is based on the website launch date I do have.
wrong_cases.ground_truth: 19 days ago. 20 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.

evaluation.explanation: Explanation: The hypothesis states that the website was launched 43 days ago, which contradicts the ground truth that the website was launched 19 days ago (or 20 days including the last day).
